arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola admits boardroom talks amid Man City crisis as financial worries grow
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola is overseeing a disastrous run of form at Manchester City, who have won just one of their last 12 matches in all competitions

arts.ttl: What Man City chairman Khaldoon Al Mubarak has told Pep Guardiola about his future amid winless run
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola only signed a new Manchester City contract one month ago but questions have been raised outside of the Etihad Stadium about his future given their terrible losing run.

arts.ttl: Chelsea: Enzo Maresca blasts Pep Guardiola critics in defence of struggling Man City boss
arts.sum: Blues coach believes injury crisis the overwhelming factor behind his former club’s shock demise in recent weeks

arts.ttl: Premier League predicted line-ups: Your guide to Boxing Day games as Liverpool host Leicester, Man City look to bounce back against Everton and Man United travel to Wolves
arts.sum: Runaway leaders Liverpool will surely be bankers when they host Leicester on Boxing Day, while Manchester City will kick the round off with a home game versus Everton.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola insists he has 'incredible' backing from Man City chiefs despite dire run of form - and reveals plan for how they can find their way out of slump
arts.sum: JACK GAUGHAN: City head into Thursday's clash at the Etihad against Everton after dropping to seventh place in the Premier League table and having lost nine of their past 12 matches.

arts.ttl: Man City might miss out on Champions League - Guardiola
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola says the club are in danger of missing out on a place in next season's Champions League.

arts.ttl: We are at risk – Pep Guardiola accepts Man City may not make Champions League
arts.sum: City have suffered defeat in six of their last eight Premier League outings.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche says ‘the feel’ of Manchester City has changed before Everton visit
arts.sum: Everton face Premier League champions on Boxing Day Pep Guardiola’s team have lost nine times in 12 matches Sean Dyche believes Manchester City’s dramatic slump has changed “the feel” around the Premier League champions and given their opponents more belief. The Everton manager accepts his team face a considerable task at the Etihad Stadium on Boxing Day against “one of the best-ever” managers in Pep Guardiola and a squad of world-class talent. But he says teams are unlikely to be as intimidated when visiting the Premier League champions of the past four years after City’s run of nine defeats in 12 games. That collapse, Dyche claimed, evokes memories of Manchester United losing the fear factor after Sir Alex Ferguson’s departure. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola fears Manchester City will miss out on Champions League
arts.sum: City have qualified for 14 seasons in a row Manager says he still has full backing of club hierarchy Pep Guardiola has admitted he fears Manchester City will not qualify for the Champions League. The club are in the tournament for a 14th consecutive season but an extraordinary slump has left them “at risk”, said the manager, who acknowledged there would be financial as well as sporting repercussions. City are seventh in the Premier League, four points behind Nottingham Forest who are in fourth. Fifth spot could secure a Champions League berth, with Uefa rewarding two leagues with an extra place based on their clubs’ performances in all European competitions this season, but Guardiola was clear about his concern as he prepared for a Boxing Day visit from Everton. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Jack Grealish Named 'Unbelievable' Star as Toughest Opponent of his Career
arts.sum: Jack Grealish named Manchester City and England team-mate Kyle Walker as the toughest opponent he's ever faced.
